title: New English and Spanish Lessons Aim to Make Rail Safety a Universal Language for Teachers, Students and Their Families
text: Union Pacific Railroad and Twin Cities Public Television Partner on Multilingual Rail Safety Campaign OMAHA, Neb. , Aug. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad and Twin Cities Public Television (TPT) are teaming up to make rail safety a universal language, launching new English- and Spanish-language safety multi-media materials aimed at families and educators as the "Back to School" season kicks off nationwide.

title: Union Pacific says third-quarter volumes up as staffing improves, congestion eases
text: U.S. railroad operator Union Pacific Corp's Chief Financial Officer Jennifer Hamann said on Tuesday the company's third-quarter volumes were up 2% so far from a year earlier, on improved staffing levels and easing congestion.
